featured-left.label: Featured Left + 2 Right
featured-left.css: .image-grid-widget .grid-item { flex: 0 0 calc(33.333% - 7px); height: 285px; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:first-child { flex: 0 0 calc(66.666% - 3px); height: 580px; }

featured-right.label: Featured Right + 2 Left
featured-right.css: .image-grid-widget .grid-item { flex: 0 0 calc(33.333% - 7px); height: 285px; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:last-child { flex: 0 0 calc(66.666% - 3px); height: 580px; }

anchor-top.label: Anchor Top
anchor-top.css: .image-grid-widget .image-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); grid-template-rows: 340px 160px; gap: 10px; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(1) { grid-column: 1 / -1; grid-row: 1; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(2) { grid-column: 1; grid-row: 2; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(3) { grid-column: 2; grid-row: 2; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(4) { grid-column: 3; grid-row: 2; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(5) { grid-column: 4; grid-row: 2; }

anchor-bottom.label: Anchor Bottom
anchor-bottom.css: .image-grid-widget .image-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); grid-template-rows: 160px 340px; gap: 10px; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(1) { grid-column: 1; grid-row: 1; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(2) { grid-column: 2; grid-row: 1; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(3) { grid-column: 3; grid-row: 1; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(4) { grid-column: 4; grid-row: 1; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(5) { grid-column: 1 / -1; grid-row: 2; }

anchor-left.label: Anchor Left
anchor-left.css: .image-grid-widget .image-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr; grid-template-rows: repeat(3, 160px); gap: 10px; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(1) { grid-column: 1; grid-row: 1 / 4; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(2) { grid-column: 2; grid-row: 1; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(3) { grid-column: 2; grid-row: 2; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(4) { grid-column: 2; grid-row: 3; }

anchor-right.label: Anchor Right
anchor-right.css: .image-grid-widget .image-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr; grid-template-rows: repeat(3, 160px); gap: 10px; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(1) { grid-column: 1; grid-row: 1; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(2) { grid-column: 1; grid-row: 2; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(3) { grid-column: 1; grid-row: 3; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(4) { grid-column: 2; grid-row: 1 / 4; }

anchor-center.label: Anchor Center
anchor-center.css: .image-grid-widget .image-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 2.5fr 1fr; grid-template-rows: 200px 200px; gap: 10px; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(1) { grid-column: 2; grid-row: 1 / 3; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(2) { grid-column: 1; grid-row: 1; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(3) { grid-column: 3; grid-row: 1; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(4) { grid-column: 1; grid-row: 2; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(5) { grid-column: 3; grid-row: 2; }

anchor-corner.label: Anchor Corner
anchor-corner.css: .image-grid-widget .image-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr; grid-template-rows: 280px 180px; gap: 10px; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(1) { grid-column: 1; grid-row: 1; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(2) { grid-column: 2; grid-row: 1; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(3) { grid-column: 3; grid-row: 1; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(4) { grid-column: 2 / 4; grid-row: 2; }

float-right.label: Float Right
float-right.css: .image-grid-widget .image-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(8, 1fr); grid-template-rows: repeat(5, 1fr); aspect-ratio: 8 / 5; gap: 10px; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(1) { grid-column: 1 / 7; grid-row: 1 / 5; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(2) { grid-column: 7 / 9; grid-row: 4 / 6; }

stack-tower.label: Stack + Tower
stack-tower.css: .image-grid-widget .image-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(8, 1fr); grid-template-rows: repeat(6, 1fr); aspect-ratio: 8 / 6; gap: 10px; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(1) { grid-column: 1 / 3; grid-row: 2 / 4; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(2) { grid-column: 3 / 5; grid-row: 2 / 4; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(3) { grid-column: 1 / 5; grid-row: 4 / 7; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(4) { grid-column: 5 / 9; grid-row: 1 / 6; }

drop-right.label: Drop Right
drop-right.css: .image-grid-widget .image-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(8, 1fr); grid-template-rows: repeat(6, 1fr); aspect-ratio: 8 / 6; gap: 10px; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(1) { grid-column: 1 / 5; grid-row: 1 / 6; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(2) { grid-column: 5 / 8; grid-row: 2 / 4; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(3) { grid-column: 5 / 9; grid-row: 4 / 7; }

cascade.label: Cascade
cascade.css: .image-grid-widget .image-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(8, 1fr); grid-template-rows: repeat(6, 1fr); aspect-ratio: 8 / 6; gap: 10px; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(1) { grid-column: 1 / 5; grid-row: 1 / 5; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(2) { grid-column: 5 / 7; grid-row: 2 / 4; } .image-grid-widget .grid-item:nth-child(3) { grid-column: 5 / 9; grid-row: 4 / 7; }
